growth_records.strain: MHGC field produced-water 18PW enrichment; continuous culture, ethylbenzene-fed

up.method: HPLC effluent measurement; steady-state mass balance D*Sfeed
steady-state mass balance D*Sfeed (GC-MS quantified feed)

sec.method: stoichiometric: 2 NO3- -> N2 (full denitrification), rate=D*5 mM

yields.note: stoichiometry: reduction of 10 mM nitrate coupled to oxidation of 1.19 mM ethylbenzene (Supplementary Table S5)

growth_records.cite: Suri, Navreet et al. Microbially Enhanced Oil Recovery by Alkylbenzene-Oxidizing Nitrate-Reducing Bacteria. Frontiers in Microbiology (2019). DOI:10.3389/fmicb.2019.01243. [PMC6591262]
growth_records.snippet: Flow was then started by injection of CSBK medium with 10 mM nitrate and 1.2 mM ethylbenzene or 1.4 mM toluene at a rate of 10 mL/day (dilution rate, D = 0.1 d-1). ... the effluent concentrations of nitrate and nitrite decreased to zero at
growth_records.notes: D=0.1 d-1 = 0.1/24 = 0.004167 h-1; mu=D at steady state. Doubling time = ln2/0.004167 = 166.3 h (ln2/0.1 = 6.93 d). Nitrate volumetric uptake at complete consumption (effluent=0 by day 20): q=D*Sfeed=0.1 d-1*10 mM=1.0 mmol/L/d = 1.0/24 = 0.0417 mmol/L/h. Ethylbenzene: 0.1*1.2=0.12 mmol/L/d = 0.005 mmol/L/h. N2: full denitrification 2 NO3- ->N2 gives 5 mM N2 per 10 mM NO3; 0.1*5=0.5 mmol/L/d=0.0208 mmol/L/h (stoichiometric, not measured). Rates are VOLUMETRIC (mmol/L/h) not per gDW: biomass reported only as OD600 (3.12 at 65 d for EB culture). Temp 22-25C (midpoint 23.5). CSBK composition only in Supplementary Table S1 (not in fulltext).

growth_records.strain: MHGC field produced-water 18PW enrichment; continuous culture, ethylbenzene-fed

up.method: HPLC effluent; steady-state D*Sfeed after effluent NO3/NO2 returned to zero (>day 65)

yields.note: 10 mM nitrate reduced per 1.19 mM ethylbenzene oxidized (Supplementary Table S5)

growth_records.cite: Suri, Navreet et al. Microbially Enhanced Oil Recovery by Alkylbenzene-Oxidizing Nitrate-Reducing Bacteria. Frontiers in Microbiology (2019). DOI:10.3389/fmicb.2019.01243. [PMC6591262]
growth_records.snippet: Increasing the rate of medium influx to 20 mL/day (D = 0.2 d-1) gave incomplete reduction ... from day 35 to 65 after which the effluent nitrate and nitrite concentrations remained at zero.
growth_records.notes: D=0.2 d-1 = 0.008333 h-1; mu=D at steady state. Doubling = ln2/0.2 = 3.47 d = 83.2 h. Full consumption after day 65 (effluent NO3/NO2 = 0): nitrate q=0.2*10=2.0 mmol/L/d=0.0833 mmol/L/h; ethylbenzene 0.2*1.2=0.24 mmol/L/d=0.01 mmol/L/h; N2 0.2*5=1.0 mmol/L/d=0.0417 mmol/L/h (stoichiometric). Volumetric rates; biomass only as OD600=3.12 (EB) at 65 d. Temp 22-25C.

growth_records.strain: MHGC field produced-water 18PW enrichment; continuous culture, toluene-fed

up.method: HPLC effluent; steady-state D*Sfeed (effluent zero by day 20)

yields.note: 10 mM nitrate reduced per 1.39 mM toluene oxidized (Supplementary Table S5)

growth_records.cite: Suri, Navreet et al. Microbially Enhanced Oil Recovery by Alkylbenzene-Oxidizing Nitrate-Reducing Bacteria. Frontiers in Microbiology (2019). DOI:10.3389/fmicb.2019.01243. [PMC6591262]
growth_records.snippet: the continuous cultures received medium with 10 mM nitrate and 1.4 mM of aqueous toluene ... effluent concentrations of nitrate and nitrite decreased to zero at day 20 in all continuous cultures
growth_records.notes: D=0.1 d-1=0.004167 h-1; mu=D. Doubling 166.3 h. Nitrate q=0.1*10=1.0 mmol/L/d=0.0417 mmol/L/h; toluene 0.1*1.4=0.14 mmol/L/d=0.00583 mmol/L/h; N2 0.1*5=0.5 mmol/L/d=0.0208 mmol/L/h (stoichiometric). Volumetric; biomass OD600=3.35 (toluene) at 65 d. Temp 22-25C.

growth_records.strain: MHGC field produced-water 18PW enrichment; continuous culture, toluene-fed

up.method: HPLC effluent; steady-state D*Sfeed (>day 65 effluent zero)

yields.note: 10 mM nitrate reduced per 1.39 mM toluene oxidized (Supplementary Table S5)

growth_records.cite: Suri, Navreet et al. Microbially Enhanced Oil Recovery by Alkylbenzene-Oxidizing Nitrate-Reducing Bacteria. Frontiers in Microbiology (2019). DOI:10.3389/fmicb.2019.01243. [PMC6591262]
growth_records.snippet: Increasing the rate of medium influx to 20 mL/day (D = 0.2 d-1) ... after which the effluent nitrate and nitrite concentrations remained at zero.
growth_records.notes: D=0.2 d-1=0.008333 h-1; mu=D. Doubling 83.2 h. Nitrate q=0.2*10=2.0 mmol/L/d=0.0833 mmol/L/h; toluene 0.2*1.4=0.28 mmol/L/d=0.01167 mmol/L/h; N2 0.2*5=1.0 mmol/L/d=0.0417 mmol/L/h. Volumetric; OD600=3.35 at 65 d. Temp 22-25C.
